content_body: We had a wonderful stay, from the moment we arrived to the classical music playing for us in the cabin to the time we left. To wake each morning to coffee by the creek was amazing. The cabin itself is beautiful. Loved the hot tub and billiards area. The fire pit and fireplace were great also. After fun days zip lining and whitewater rafting it was nice to return to the cabin and relax. Looking forward to our next stay!
title: "Looking forward to our next stay!"
